literal: a very meager or restricted diet; subsistence on scant or poor food
tell me; a prompt or request for information or explanation
petty arguments or bickering consisting of back-and-forth remarks
to die; to pass away (coarse slang)
proverbial remark that good things or benefits sometimes go to those unable to enjoy them
an exclamation meaning 'God forbid,' expressing a strong wish that something not occur
a person (typically a woman in usage) who is regarded as exceptionally skilled or desirable as a sexual partner
to engage in a purposeless, overly subtle, or purely speculative argument about matters of no practical consequence
to take immediate, often aggressive action without first seeking information, clarification, or permission
deliberate use of contradictory, two-faced, or deceptive speech intended to mislead or present different messages to different audiences
application of different standards, rules, or judgments to similar situations or people, typically implying unfairness or hypocrisy
natural talent or aptitude for dealing with people; ease in social interaction, the ability to make others feel comfortable and to communicate effectively
a person considered to be of no importance, influence, or social standing; a nobody
in a very remote or isolated place; in the middle of nowhere
in a very distant, hard-to-reach, or isolated place; the middle of nowhere
in a remote, out-of-the-way place; far from towns or centers of activity
to ask where something or someone will end up, what the final destination or outcome will be
to present unpleasant information in a more pleasant or palatable way; to soften bad news or mitigate the harshness of a fact
to sleep soundly and comfortably, without worries or disturbances
to sleep very deeply and peacefully, without being easily awakened or disturbed
